traps: The dataTransfer field is a composite dataTransferV2 widget. Its value must be an array of transfer entries, each with entryType, value, unit, and a region field. Valid entryTypes: INBOUND, OUTBOUND, INTRA_REGION.

OUTBOUND entries require a "toRegion" field — use "External" for internet or "other" for other AWS regions. INBOUND entries require a "fromRegion" field with the same options. INTRA_REGION requires neither.
All three entryTypes (INBOUND, OUTBOUND, INTRA_REGION) must be present in the array even if their value is "0".
